title: WarrantyLifeCycleMgmtSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents settings that control the Warranty Administration for your org.

enableWarrantyLCMgmt.description: Indicates whether warranty life-cycle management is enabled in your org (true) or not false).

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of WarrantyLifeCycleMgmtSettings component.
declarative_metadata_sample_definition.code:
<!--
   ~ Copyright 2022 salesforce.com, inc.
   ~ All Rights Reserved
   ~ Company Confidential
   -->
<WarrantyLifecycleMgmtSettings
	xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata">
	<enableWarrantyLCMgmt>true</enableWarrantyLCMgmt>
</WarrantyLifecycleMgmtSettings>
